assertions.assertion: Calls ConfigureDPoPTokensForScheme on IServiceCollection (builder.Services), NOT inside the AddJwtBearer options lambda
assertions.rationale: Code shows builder.Services.ConfigureDPoPTokensForScheme("token") called on IServiceCollection, with explicit warning about wrong placement inside AddJwtBearer

assertions.assertion: Registers a distributed cache implementation (e.g., AddDistributedMemoryCache or Redis) for DPoP replay detection
assertions.rationale: Code shows builder.Services.AddDistributedMemoryCache() with explanation about production alternatives

assertions.assertion: Sets ValidTypes to include 'at+jwt' on the JWT bearer handler
